title: Consolidated edition — view anchors and trace edges
purpose: A consolidated Act PDF merges amendments into one reading text. To keep traceability honest, introduce :ConsolidatedViewPassage anchors in the graph and link them to underlying :Section and :LawInstrument nodes (not only :TextChunk from the consolidated file).
relationships: VIEW_TRACES_TO_SECTION — anchor → underlying Section (statute or amendment section node)
